description: Style Note The perfect accomplice for your tunic tops or short kurtas, these loose trousers are must-haves in any fashionable wardrobe. Make sure yours is the most fashionable outfit with these trendy carrot-top pants from flying machine.Product Details Black trousers, has a buttoned and zippered closure, panel in the front and back under the waistband with pleats to give a loose look at the top, insert pockets in front with pleat on it and a broad band at the hemlines to give a tapered look at the bottomMaterial Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Do not tumble dry Do not dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron, do not iron on print Size and Fit The model (height 6'and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
